parts.text: {"family":"Hofmann-Loffler-Freytag Reaction","candidate":{"candidate_id":"C3","substrate_smiles":["CCCCN(C)Cl"],"product_smiles":["CN1CCCC1"],"optional_reagent_smiles":["O=S(=O)(O)O"],"rationale":"Canonical HLF reaction. N-chloroamine cyclizes to a pyrrolidine via intramolecular C-H amination under acidic conditions.","collision_avoidance_note":"Avoids Barton-like motifs (e.g., thiohydroxamates, peroxides, hv) and decarboxylative halogenation. Simple N-haloamine substrate."}}
